headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $127
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Rachael Rothman   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $133 to $127.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $144
